titleStmt.title: SII 25.191: original edition by M. D. Sampath
No. 191. (A.R. No. 191 of 1908.) KŌVILŪR, PATTUKKOTTAI TALUK, THANJAVUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the south wall of the maṇḍapa in front of the central shrine in the Mantrapurīśvara temple.

This record is not dated in the reign of any particular king but it refers to the regnal year 38. The king is perhaps identical with a Chōḷa king who had the highest regnal year i.e., Kulōttuṅgachōḷa III.

The record gives the details of the boundaries of the dēvadāna lands of the deity Tiruvuśāttāṉam-uḍaiyār, excluding the tiruviḷakkuppuṟam and other lands. The details of the land boundaries are given.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
[śrī] Uṭaiyār tiruvucāttānamuṭaiyār tevatānam yāṇṭu muppatteṭṭāvatu varaiyum Ūrkkiḻ Iṟaiyiliyāṉa nilattum tiruviḷakkuppuṟam ṇiyāṉa nilattum Irupatañ
cāvatu nāḷilk kalveṭṭi veṭṭiṉa nilaṅkaḷ nikki nikki niṉṟa Iṟaiyili nilattukkuk kalveṭṭu . tāmotara vāykkāl kiḻkaṇṭattu maccumuṟippāḷ Eṉṟu pe Innilam Orumāviṉ ki
ḻaraiye muṉṟumā mukkāṇikkum kiḻpārkkellai nārācavarampukku meṟkum teṉpāṟkkellai tevappiḷḷai Āṇṭār nilattukku vaṭa
kkum melpārkkellai pūñcolai paṭṭavāykkālukkuk kiḻakkum vaṭapārkkellai pavaḷakkuṉṟu Āṭavallāṉ paṭṭaṉ nilattukku teṟkum Āka Icainta peruṉāṉkellaik kuḷpaṭṭa nilam Orumāviṉ
kiḻaraiye muṉṟumā mukkāṇiyum Itaṉ vaṭakke pontu Innāyaṉār tevatāṉam tiruviḷakkuppuṟam tevappiḷḷai Āṇṭār marutāṇṭār kuṭi Innilam Araimā Araikkāṇi munti māṇikkum kiḻpārkkellai nārācavarampukku meṟkum teṉpārkkellai A koyil koṇṭāṉ cirāmapaṭṭaṉ nilattukku vaṭakkum melpārkkellai muṟc
collappaṭṭa vāykkālukku kiḻakkum vaṭapārkkellai Innāyaṉār tevatāṉam tiruvuḷakkuppuṟam Aravintalocaṉa paṭṭaṉ ku
ṭi nilattukku teṟkum Āka Icainta perunāṉkellaik kuḷpaṭṭa nilam Araimā varaikkāṇiyum Itaṉ vaṭakku Innāyaṉār tevatāṉam tiruviḷakkuppuṟam kaḷattūr Aravi
nta locaṉa paṭṭaṉ kuṭi nilam Araimā Araikkāṇi muntirikaik kiḻaraiye Irumāvaraikkum kiḻpārkkellai nārācavarampukku meṟkkum teṉpārkkellai Innāyaṉār tevatāṉa nilattukku va
ṭakkum melpārkkellai muṟccollappaṭṭa vāykkālukkuk kiḻakkum vaṭapārkkellai Innāyaṉār tevatāṉam muṉpu kalveṭṭiṉa nilattukku teṟkum Āka Icainta perunāṉ
kellaikkuḷpaṭṭa nilam Araimā Araikkāṇi muntirikai kiḻaraiye Irumāvaraiyum Itaṉ vaṭakku InnāyaIncomplete.
Digital edition of SII 25.191 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
